doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: This document grossly misrepresents Illinois eviction law by falsely stating tenants must vacate within 5 days without court proceedings, when Illinois actually requires judicial process and allows tenants to cure by paying rent.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois landlord-tenant law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, when Illinois law actually requires a judicial eviction proceeding and tenants have the right to cure by paying rent during the notice period.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document grossly misrepresents Illinois eviction law by falsely stating tenants must vacate within 5 days without court proceedings, when Illinois actually requires judicial process and allows tenants to cure by paying rent.
